titleStmt.title: SII 31.244: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 244. (A.R. No. B 214 of 1936.) INUMEḶḶA, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Bhāvanārāṇasvāmy temple situated to the west of the village.
This inscription is dated in the Śaka 1730, Vibhava, Māgha, śu. Pūrnima, corresponding to January 31, Tuesday, 1809 A.D.

States that Veṁkkaṭaramaṇaya (Veṁkkaṭaramaṇamma), the frist wife of Rāja Veṁkaṭaguṁḍarāyaniṁgāru got polished the golden kalaśa and also conscrated the chakra of the pinnacle. It also records the establishment of a garden and construction of a tank in the garden situated on the eastern side of the village in the name of Bangārayya (Bangāramma), the younger daughter of Ravaṇamma, the first wife of Venkataguṇḍārāyaḍu It further records the specific qualities of rice, oil etc., supplied for the daily worship of the god thrice a day and also for the maintenance of the nine day festivals (navāmika-vutsavanu) to god obviously Bhavānārāyaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śālivāhana śakavaraṣaṁbulu 1730 Agunēṭi
vibhava saṁvatsara māṣu śutha paurṇami yaṁ
du rājāpeṁkaṭa guṁḍārāyaniṁgāri jēṣṭha bhā
ryagāraina veṁkkaṭramaṇayyagāru svāmivārikō
vela vimānaṁ mīdanu baṁgārumolāmu cē
śina kaḷaśamuṁnnū cakraṁ cēyiṁcci pratiṣṭha cē
yiṁcināru . śrīsvāmivārki yinu meḷlanunnu śivā
rubhadṛpāleṁ sametu Agrahāramulugā sarmapiṁci
naṁdnu bhadṛpāleṁlōnu ravaṇaṁmmagāri ciṁnnako
māraigāraina baṁgārayyagāri pēru beṭṭigrāmā
naku tūrpubhāgamaṁdu vanaṁ vēyiṁcci Aṁ
dulō bhāvitavviṁcci yiṁdku vuttarabhāgamaṁ
dnu cervu vēyiṁccinārū
Akṣatārōpaṇamamyēṭaṭṭugānavā
mmikavutsavamunnu jargutū vuṁsadi
nityamunnu svāmivārki nālgu Avusaramu
lu jargutū vunnavi . prātaḥ kālamaṁdnu da
dyōdanaṁ Āragiṁpū mādhyānnikamaṁdu
pūrna taḷiha paḷlu 17 paḍiva 1 ki biyyaṁ mā .
pesalu 0 Ê-. neyyittu � lu paṁḍu tu 2 lu Ākulu
vakkalu cilarānunnu Akhaṁḍālu 2 ki neyyiśē 2 lunnu
dīpārādhanalku nūne śe 0 . nnu sāyaṁkālamaṁ
du vaḍa tirupaṇnaramunnu rātri pavaḷiṁpu kāla
maṁdu tirukaṇaumaduṁnnu yīprakāraṁ niraṁ
ttaraṁ jargutū vuṁnnadi .
Digital edition of SII 31.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
